Title: Register a new user successfully
Preconditions: None
Test Data:
- Username: john_doe
- Password: password123
- Name: John Doe
- Email: johndoe@example.com
Test Steps:
1. User calls `registerUser()` on the main system.
2. Main system sends a request to the Users Database to verify the user data.
3. Users Database verifies the data and returns a success message.
4. Main system confirms successful registration to the user.
Expected Result: User receives a confirmation message indicating successful registration.

Title: Register a new user with invalid email
Preconditions: None
Test Data:
- Username: jane_doe
- Password: password123
- Name: Jane Doe
- Email: invalidemail
Test Steps:
1. User calls `registerUser()` on the main system.
2. Main system sends a request to the Users Database to verify the user data.
3. Users Database returns an error due to invalid email format.
4. Main system confirms registration failure to the user.
Expected Result: User receives a confirmation message indicating registration failure due to invalid email.

Title: Create a new trip
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in.
Test Data:
- City: New York
- Country: USA
- BegginigDate: 2023-10-01
- FinishDate: 2023-10-07
- Author: John Doe
- IdPlan: 1
Test Steps:
1. User calls `createTrip()` on the main system.
2. Main system sets the trip details including city, country, dates, author, and plan.
3. Main system saves the trip data to the Trips Database.
Expected Result: Trip is created successfully and saved in the database.

Title: Attempt to create a trip with invalid dates
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in.
Test Data:
- City: New York
- Country: USA
- BegginigDate: 2023-10-08
- FinishDate: 2023-10-07
- Author: John Doe
- IdPlan: 1
Test Steps:
1. User calls `createTrip()` on the main system.
2. Main system attempts to set the trip details including city, country, dates, author, and plan.
3. Main system detects invalid date range and returns an error.
Expected Result: User receives an error message indicating invalid date range.

Title: Add a place to visit to a trip
Preconditions: Trip exists and user is logged in.
Test Data:
- Name: Statue of Liberty
- IdCategory: 1
- IdTrip: 1
Test Steps:
1. User calls `addPlaceToVisit()` on the main system.
2. Main system sets the place to visit details including name, category, and trip.
3. Main system saves the place to visit data to the Trips Database.
Expected Result: Place to visit is added successfully to the trip and saved in the database.

Title: Attempt to add a place to visit without specifying a category
Preconditions: Trip exists and user is logged in.
Test Data:
- Name: Central Park
- IdCategory: null
- IdTrip: 1
Test Steps:
1. User calls `addPlaceToVisit()` on the main system.
2. Main system attempts to set the place to visit details including name, category, and trip.
3. Main system detects missing category and returns an error.
Expected Result: User receives an error message indicating missing category.

Title: Create a new category
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. User calls `createCategory()` on the main system.
2. Main system sets the category details including name and icon.
3. Main system saves the category data to the database.
Expected Result: Category is created successfully and saved in the database.

Title: Attempt to create a category with an empty name

Test Steps:
1. User calls `createCategory()` on the main system.
2. Main system attempts to set the category details including name and icon.
3. Main system detects empty name and returns an error.

Title: Create a daily plan for a trip
Preconditions: Trip exists and user is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User calls `createDailyPlan()` on the main system.
2. Main system sets the daily plan details including day and weather.
3. Main system saves the daily plan data to the Trips Database.
Expected Result: Daily plan is created successfully and saved in the database.

Title: Attempt to create a daily plan with an invalid date
Preconditions: Trip exists and user is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User calls `createDailyPlan()` on the main system.
2. Main system attempts to set the daily plan details including day and weather.
3. Main system detects invalid date and returns an error.
Expected Result: User receives an error message indicating invalid date.

Title: Retrieve weather data for a daily plan
Preconditions: Daily plan exists and user is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User calls `getWeatherData()` on the main system.
2. Main system retrieves the weather data for the specified daily plan.
3. Main system returns the weather data to the user.
Expected Result: Weather data is retrieved successfully and returned to the user.

Title: Attempt to retrieve weather data for a non-existent daily plan
Preconditions: Daily plan does not exist and user is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User calls `getWeatherData()` on the main system.
2. Main system attempts to retrieve the weather data for the specified daily plan.
3. Main system detects non-existent daily plan and returns an error.
Expected Result: User receives an error message indicating non-existent daily plan.

Title: List all trips
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User calls `listTrips()` on the main system.
2. Main system retrieves all trips associated with the user.
3. Main system displays the list of trips to the user.
Expected Result: User receives a list of all trips associated with the user.

Title: Attempt to list trips without being logged in
Preconditions: User is not logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User tries to call `listTrips()` on the main system.
2. Main system checks if the user is logged in.
3. Main system denies access and prompts the user to log in.
Expected Result: User is prompted to log in before listing trips.

Title: Login with correct credentials
Preconditions: User is registered.
Test Steps:
1. User calls `userLogin(email, password)` on the main system.
2. Main system sends a request to the Users Database to validate the credentials.
3. Users Database verifies the credentials and returns a success message.
4. Main system confirms successful login to the user.
Expected Result: User receives a confirmation message indicating successful login.
